meta.title: Dr. Jorge Arce — Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery · v15 Norris
meta.description: Board-certified oral & maxillofacial surgeon. Twenty-seven years of verified surgical work in the South Bay.

sections.sub: Twenty-seven years on the complex extractions, reconstructions, and full-arch implant cases other surgeons refer out.

rows.ds: A family that valued precision and patience long before the scalpel.
Trained in Colombia; moved to California to specialize — and never left.
Career devoted entirely to oral & maxillofacial surgery and implantology.
Founds the Dental Implants Center of South Bay — Redondo Beach & Torrance.
The first call for referring dentists across the South Bay.

cards.ds: From single implants to full-arch All-On-X reconstruction, planned and placed with precision.
A complete new set of teeth for patients who were told nothing more could be done.
Rebuilding function and structure where bone and tissue have been lost.
The difficult surgeries other clinicians prefer to refer elsewhere.
Identifying and addressing conditions affecting teeth, gums, bone, and joints.
Clarity for complex decisions — including, when right, the advice not to operate.

sections.attr: Dr. Jorge Arce — Founder, Dental Implants Center of South Bay

cards.q: I had been told by two surgeons it was impossible. Dr. Arce took the time no one else did. I can eat, smile, and speak again.
When a case is beyond what I can handle, Jorge is the first call I make. My patients always come back grateful — and so do I.
The most thorough and honest surgeon I have ever met. He treated my father like family.
Calm, precise, and genuinely kind. He explained every step until I understood.
I refer my most complex cases to Dr. Arce without hesitation. Twenty-seven years shows.
I was terrified of the procedure. He never rushed me. Best decision I have made for my health.
Years of pain, gone. I only wish I had found him sooner.
Reliable, communicative, and surgically excellent. A full report back, every time.
The level of care and follow-up is rare. My patients trust him, and that trust reflects back on my practice.

sections.title: Get on the <s>schedule.</s>
sections.body: Bring your scans, your referral letter, or just your questions — every case starts with an honest conversation. Ask for the free guide: What to expect from your first implant consultation.

form.fine: By submitting, you agree to be contacted by Dental Implants Center of South Bay. Your information is never shared.
